meaning: n.略图,草图,概略,梗概,草图,拟定vi.绘略图,素描v.勾画
examples: She drew a sketch map of the area to show us the way.
The drama group did a sketch about a couple buying a new car.
She made her cakes without drawing sketch first.
On his honeymoon in 1833, William Henry Fox Talbot struggled to sketch the Italian countryside.
Matthew gave the elders maps and had them sketch migration routes and waterfowl habitat.
